headline: Anthropic's Mythos family launch with Fable 5 drives a wave of agentic demonstrations across simulation, CAD, and gameplay.
body: Anthropic released the Mythos model family with Fable 5 as a generally available option, free on Pro, Max, Team, and Enterprise plans through June 22 before usage shifts to credits. A cluster of Fable 5 demonstrations followed: autonomous Factorio play, solar system simulation predicting a solar eclipse, a fluid simulation synced to a Beethoven remix, and a 3D-printable model designed in a Claude-built CAD editor. On the infrastructure side, GPU clusters, inference engines, and parallel reasoning are breaking out, with RunPod's Flash tool exposing IDE-to-GPU-cloud deployment via a single decorator. Retrieval discourse also surfaced, with Turbopuffer reframing RAG as a broader paradigm spanning vector search, full text search, and filters rather than embeddings alone.
